arts.sum: Brighton forward Evan Ferguson is one to watch ahead of the final days of the January transfer window. Ferguson has failed to earn a regular role in Fabian Hurzeler’s role and is open to an exit in search of minutes. arts.ttl: Al-Nassr end attempts to sign Brighton's Mitoma
arts.sum: Al-Nassr end their attempts to sign Brighton's Kaoru Mitoma after the Seagulls make it clear they have no intention of selling the Japan forward.

arts.ttl: Brighton man stuck at club as exit ‘depends on third parties’ – Seagulls struggling to find solution
arts.sum: Valentin Barco remains stuck at Sevilla, with Brighton and Hove Albion yet to find another destination for him so his loan deal can be cancelled. That’s according to ABC Sevilla, who reports that his departure ‘depends on third parties’ at this moment in time.
